batches.title: Research Package

deliverables.skill_md_additions: OpenCode tool matrix, MCP priority table, activity output section, 3 bash examples, 1 decision tree (~200 lines added)

success_criteria: SKILL.md has ≥5 concrete bash command examples with expected output
SKILL.md has MCP tool function signatures with rate limits and fallbacks
templates/research-packet.json has all fields with example values
references/mcp-tool-protocols.md covers all 6 MCP server categories
scripts/hm-research-validate.sh exits 0 on valid, 1 on invalid research output
4-mode depth scaling (Quick/Standard/Deep/UltraDeep) documented with thresholds
Vocabulary discovery phase documented with 5-step process

batches.title: Synthesis Package

deliverables.skill_md_additions: Claims-evidence tables, credibility scoring, progressive assembly, activity output section (~200 lines added)

success_criteria: SKILL.md has claims-evidence table format with field descriptions
Source credibility scoring (0-100) with domain authority, recency, expertise, bias components
Progressive assembly strategy documented (section-by-section for large syntheses)
Counterevidence register template provided
Diminishing-returns detection criteria listed
3+ concrete bash examples for synthesis validation

batches.title: Delegation Package

deliverables.skill_md_additions: Multi-packet support, hierarchical JSON, cross-domain evidence, activity output section (~200 lines added)

success_criteria: Multi-packet delegation format documented with sequential/parallel modes
Hierarchical JSON schema supports TOC, metadata grep, offset reading
Cross-domain multi-slice investigation template provided
Structured evidence return schema (JSON) for sub-agent returns
Delta-query specification format for gap-filling
3+ concrete bash examples for delegation packet validation

batches.title: Refactor Package

deliverables.skill_md_additions: Code review with tool references, LSP integration, activity output section (~200 lines added)

success_criteria: Code review checklist references specific OpenCode tools (grep, glob, lsp, read)
LSP operations documented for refactor impact analysis (findReferences, prepareCallHierarchy)
Tool selection matrix for refactor operations (when grep vs lsp vs read)
3+ concrete bash examples with git rollback commands
Refactor packet template with scope, tools, verification gates

batches.title: Activity Folder Protocol

deliverables.skill_md_additions: 15-line Activity Output section added to all 18 SKILL.md files (~270 lines total)

success_criteria: Activity folder protocol document covers naming, hierarchy, timestamps, attribution
OpenCode tool matrix covers all 14 built-in tools with when-to-use conditions
MCP priority order document covers all 6 priority levels with rate limits
hm-artifact-validate.sh confirms filename has date, JSON has _meta, path is valid
hm-artifact-create.sh creates artifact with auto-populated _meta
All 18 SKILL.md files have Activity Output section referencing shared protocol

batches.title: Remaining Skills

deliverables.per_skill_additions: Each of 14 skills gets: 3+ bash examples, 1+ decision tree, 1+ template, OpenCode tool matrix reference, activity output section. Skills needing MCP integration get MCP priority reference.

success_criteria: All 14 skills have ≥3 concrete bash command examples
All 14 skills have ≥1 IF/THEN decision tree with concrete conditions
All 14 skills have ≥1 fill-in template with fields and example values
All 14 skills reference the shared OpenCode tool matrix
All 14 skills have Activity Output section
Skills with external data needs reference MCP priority order
No SKILL.md exceeds 500 lines (detailed content in references/)

recommended_next_action: Execute BATCH-5 (Activity Protocol) first — it creates shared infrastructure referenced by all other batches. Then dispatch BATCH-1, BATCH-3, and BATCH-4 in parallel since they are independent. BATCH-2 follows BATCH-1. BATCH-6 can run in parallel with BATCH-1 through BATCH-4 once BATCH-5 completes.
